text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion and I are in Hokkaido for the
Sapporo Kinen. We're surrounded by reporters
almost as soon as we arrive.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion! How are you feeling in the lead-up
to the race?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I have no complaints. More importantly...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm very excited to be able to run against Air
Groove! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right. The skilled runner who has entered
the Sapporo Kinen is none other than Fine
Motion's roommate, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: We even traveled here together today, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Geez... It's only too easy guess where you'll be.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Groove! You're going to make me blush
saying things like that in front of all these
people! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm saying that you always cause a ruckus! Stop
taking everything as a compliment!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
Wow, they're already going at it! Air Groove,
what are your thoughts on your showdown with
Fine Motion?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Ahem.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I'm well aware of her ability. I'll admit
that I didn't expect to run against her, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You could say that I had been hoping it would
happen.
I do hope you're planning on making it
interesting, Fine.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...!
Y-yes! Of course!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... There you have it. It seems like we should
have quite a race in store for everyone. Please
look forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
We can't wait!
Good luck to the both of you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I really want to leave Groove gobsmacked...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion begins muttering strange things to
herself right before the race...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
She has such high expectations for me. I want to
make it interesting for her with a surprise!
choice_data_list: I don't think that's what she meant...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's fine if that's not how she meant it. This is what
I want to do!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm up against Groove! It would be insulting if I
just ran normally.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
For example, I could hang behind and buuuuild
up my power, until...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Whoosh! I blast on by her right at the end! That'd shock her, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, an "end closer" strategy... If Fine
Motion's current form is up to it, it might be a
strategy worth considering.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll leave the final decision up to you. ♪ After all,
even if I run normally...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten so good it's shocking in its own right,
isn't it? ♪
